title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Siemens-USDT Ltd
body: "Application number 5156  Applicant Siemens Aktiengesellschaft objected to the name used by Siemens-USDT Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Siemens-USDT Ltd is changed to 15935902, Ltd. "
